name: HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_VL
query: SELECT HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B.TL_TASK_FEATURES_ID, HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B.ENTERPRISE_ID, HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_TL.TASK_NAME, HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_TL.DESCRIPTION, HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B.TASK_SHORT_NAME, HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B.LOGIC_EXPRESION, HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B.TYPE, HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B.URL_RESOURCE, HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B.SEQUENCE_NUM, HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B.CREATED_BY, HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B.CREATION_DATE, HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY FROM HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B, HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_TL HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_TL WHERE HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_B.TL_TASK_FEATURES_ID = HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_TL.TL_TASK_FEATURES_ID AND HWM_TL_TASK_FEATURES_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
